description: findAccount lowercases the email before the map lookup; findSession and findDevice pass their keys unchanged.

findings.rationale: findAccount is structurally near-identical to findSession and findDevice (single-arg map lookup with ?? null) but calls toLowerCase on the key first. The normalisation is load-bearing: without it, 'Alice@Example.COM' and 'alice@example.com' resolve to different (or missing) records, producing auth failures for users who registered with mixed-case email addresses. An agent that unifies the three helpers will drop the normalisation unless warned.

tier_note: Requires structural+data-flow detector; beyond regex detector scope.
